login.signInSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access the game
login.createSubtitle: Join the hunt by creating a new account
login.passwordHint: Password must be at least 6 characters long
login.toggleToRegister: Don't have an account? Create one
login.toggleToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
login.registerSuccess: Registration successful! You can now log in.
login.selectOrgDesc: You have access to multiple organizations. Please select which one you'd like to access:

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.

map.autoSyncNote: ℹ️ This is automatically synced from the Jotihunt API
map.counterHuntZone: Counter-hunt must be placed within this zone
map.speedHelp: Adjusts prediction circle size based on assumed fox movement speed
map.noHints: No hints available. Load hints from the Updates page first.
map.clickReport: Click on map to report fox location
map.clickPlace: Click on map to place fox marker
map.whichFoxTeam: 🦊 Which Fox Team Did You Spot?
map.chooseSpotted: Choose the fox team you spotted...
map.helpReport: 💡 Help other hunters by reporting fox sightings!
map.reportHelpsAll: 🎯 Your fox report helps everyone! Other hunters can see the latest fox locations and plan their hunts accordingly.
map.solutionPlaceholder: Enter the solution text (codeword, postcode, etc.)
map.solutionHint: 💡 Enter exactly as described in the hint rules
map.deadlineNote: ⏱️ 20 min deadline - 1 point per correct area!
map.fillRevealed: Fill in only the fox areas revealed by this hint. You can leave most fields empty - only enter coordinates for the areas you discovered.
map.note1: ✅ Only solution text is required - coordinates are optional
map.note2: 🎯 Correct coordinates reveal fox locations on the map
map.note3: ⚡ Submit within 20 minutes for maximum points (1 point per correct area)
map.foxReported: 🦊 Fox location reported successfully! Thank you for helping track the foxes!
map.noRouteData: No route data found for this fox in the selected time period. Try a longer time span or the fox may not have any recorded locations yet.
map.hintSolved: 🎯 Hint solved! Revealed {{areas}} fox locations on the map!

chat.sendFailed: Failed to send message. Please try again.
chat.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message?
chat.needTeam: You need to be part of a team to access chat
chat.noMessages: No messages yet. Start the conversation!
chat.beFirst: Be the first to start the conversation in {{channel}}!
chat.joinTeam: Join a team to start chatting!

updateDetail.hintSolutionDesc: Submit your answer along with any fox location coordinates this hint might reveal
updateDetail.teamAreaRelevant: 📍 This update is relevant to your team's area ({{area}})
updateDetail.contactLeader: Contact your team leader or check the
updateDetail.solutionPlaceholder: Enter your solution to the hint...
updateDetail.foxLocationsHelp: Optional: Enter coordinates for any fox areas this hint reveals

hunt.title: Submit Fox Hunt
hunt.selectFoxArea: Select a fox area to hunt
hunt.noAreas: ⚠️ No fox areas found. Contact admin to set up fox teams.
hunt.areasFound: 🎯 Found {{count}} fox areas available for hunting
hunt.photoHelp: Take a photo as proof of your hunt. Max 10MB.
hunt.locationOptional: Location optional - will use default if not available
hunt.locationError: Unable to get current location. Please enable location services.
hunt.geoUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported by this browser.
hunt.selectAreaPhoto: Please select an area and take a photo
hunt.submitSuccess: Hunt submitted successfully! It will be reviewed by administrators.

locationSettings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all your location history? This cannot be undone.
locationSettings.unableLoadDesc: There was an error loading your location settings.
locationSettings.pageSubtitle: Manage your location tracking preferences and privacy settings
locationSettings.enableSharingDesc: Allow your team members to see your location on the map
locationSettings.privacyModeDesc: Hide your location from all users (including team members)
locationSettings.updateIntervalHelp: How often your location is updated (lower values use more battery)
locationSettings.offlineThresholdHelp: How long before you're considered offline
locationSettings.privacyInfo1: Your location data is automatically deleted after 7 days to protect your privacy.
locationSettings.privacyInfo2: When privacy mode is enabled, your location is not visible to anyone, including team members.
locationSettings.privacyInfo3: Location sharing can be disabled while still allowing hunt submissions with manual coordinates.
locationSettings.privacyInfo4: Administrators may still see your location during hunt submissions for verification purposes.

subscriptions.title: Group-Fox Team Management
subscriptions.overviewDesc: Manage the link between groups and fox teams
